calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Setting A Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Shawna Van Tree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, John StewartCompany,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Brendan Cole aka Brendon Cole,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration admitted into evidence.

Judgment: For Injunctive Relief to Abate a Private and Public Nuisance

It is ordered, adjudged and decreed that Defendant Brendan Cole aka Brendon Cole is enjoined and restrained from entering into the Lyric Hotel located at 140 Jones Street, San Francisco, California, for five (5)years, beginning this day July 30 2013 and ending July 30, 2018.

It is further ordered, adjudged and decreed that Defendant Brendan Cole aka Brendon Cole is enjoined and restrained and ordered to stay 25 yards away from the Lyric Hotel located at 140 Jones Street, San Francisco, California for five years, beginning this day, July 30 2013 and ending July 30, 2018.

It is furthered ordered that Defendant Brendan Cole aka Brendon Cole shall be subject to the provisions of this Judgment (Injunction) after he has been personally served with a copy of this Judgment (Injunction).

It is further ordered that this Judgment is subject to modification by any party to the action upon properly noticed motion in accordance with California Code of Civil Procedure, the Rules of Court and applicable local rules.

It is further ordered that this Judgment may be renewed and extended upon application by Plaintiff.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
